tweets.text: RT @DeFiSpartan: The largest lending market in DeFi, Aave V3, launched on Ethereum 3 years ago What does 3 years of continuous, verifiable interest rates look like? If you deposited 100 USDC on day 1, you'd have 116.07 USDC today 16.07% total return, 5.09% APY
tweets.summary: Aave V3 marks 3 years live on Ethereum, showing 16.07% cumulative/5.09% APY return on USDC deposits.

tweets.text: There are fundamental differences between prediction markets and casinos that make the former subject to the @CFTC's regulatory remit and not that of the states. Watch me break things down on the @glennbeck program 👇 https://t.co/MURHQLO21b
tweets.summary: CFTC chair argues prediction markets fall under CFTC jurisdiction, not states, distinguishing them from casinos.

tweets.text: RT @NarvaezChris_: Last week, founders, developers, and investors came together in NYC for Modern Finance: Builders for Clarity. We discussed the future of crypto policy, connected with fellow builders, and took action by contacting lawmakers ahead of the expected CLARITY Act vote. Thanks to everyone who joined us, and to @standwithcrypto and Rogue Assembly for partnering with us.
tweets.summary: Crypto builders met in NYC to organize lawmaker outreach ahead of the expected CLARITY Act vote.

tweets.text: The Clarity Act is not just a “crypto bill”. It’s a decision about whether America leads the next financial system or watches from the sidelines.
tweets.summary: Sen. Lummis frames the Clarity Act as determining US leadership in the next financial system.

tweets.text: The Senate is back from recess July 13, and they need to hear from the people they represent. The next recess is August 8th, so the Clarity Act now faces a hard deadline of August 7 to pass the Senate. The clock is ticking. Call your Senator to schedule a vote 👇 https://t.co/v6qJVHLpXO
tweets.summary: Advocacy push citing Aug 7 deadline for Senate to pass the Clarity Act before August recess.

tweets.text: 1/ Crypto is a tool for advancing freedom around the world. A new article from leaders at the @NEDemocracy explains how NED uses crypto to support democratic movements in some of the world's most repressive environments, and why the U.S. needs the Clarity Act to foster this innovation. https://t.co/1s7ou4XDYW
tweets.summary: Industry group argues Clarity Act passage is needed to foster crypto's role in supporting democracy movements.
